text:
Well. I think the best thing I ever did was get me a real... golden retriever. That dog was my favorite.

You go to California when you're twenty. That'll prob'ly happen. And there's a place called Hearloom. You know about Hearloom? Yeah. They got these old-fashioned birdhouses in there. Birdhouses with big floppy..."

Oh! Did I scare you? Okay. But I love those birds. I just love the way they strut around.
